text: The shipping was super fast and the product arrived in great condition. Really happy with this purchase.
notes: clear positive with single dominant theme

text: App crashes every single time I try to upload a photo larger than 5MB. Please fix this — it's been broken for weeks now.
notes: clear bug report; action item required

text: The pricing tiers are confusing. The pro plan doesn't clearly explain what features are included compared to standard.
notes: complaint about clarity — negative because user is dissatisfied

text: Love the new dashboard, it's so much faster than before. One small thing — would be nice to filter by date range.
notes: positive overall but feature suggestion → action item expected

text: Great product, exceeded expectations!
notes: short positive; themes optional, no specific topic

text: Shipping was slow, customer support did not reply for three days, and the product arrived damaged. I want a refund.
notes: multi-issue complaint; multiple themes + action item

text: On Android 14, the login screen keeps redirecting back to itself in an infinite loop. Cannot sign in at all.
notes: specific bug on specific platform

text: Payment failed three times in a row even though my card has plenty of balance. The error message just says try again later.
notes: clear payment issue

text: Would love to see keyboard shortcuts for the most common actions. Would speed up my workflow significantly.
notes: feature request — neutral sentiment, action item required

text: El producto es excelente pero el envío fue demasiado lento. Tardó dos semanas en llegar y la caja venía un poco dañada.
notes: Spanish language detection + mixed (good product, bad shipping)

text: Customer support has been unresponsive for over a week. I've sent three follow-up emails and heard nothing back so far.
notes: clear support complaint

text: Could you add a dark mode toggle? My eyes get tired using the bright interface at night.
notes: polite feature suggestion → neutral + action

text: CSV import silently fails when there are trailing commas in any row. No error message, no upload, just nothing happens.
notes: technical bug with specific repro

text: This product is not what I expected at all based on the description. I would like a full refund, please process it as soon as possible.
notes: refund demand; action required

text: The build quality is outstanding. Materials feel premium and everything is solidly constructed. Worth every penny.
notes: clear positive on quality theme; no action needed

text: product worked 1000 yrs ago and now is bad
notes: absurd premise — themes should be generic (e.g. 'quality'); action items must be actionable in the present, not parrot the fictional time-travel framing ('match historical standards' etc.). Content check via forbidden substrings.

text: absolutely love this product, best purchase I've made all year!
notes: pure praise — no action items even when the model wants to invent something. Locks in v1.1 behavior we want to keep.

text: would absolutely love a dark mode!
notes: enthusiastic feature request — should be neutral despite 'absolutely love' wording (the user is asking for a change, not praising what exists). v1.1 misclassifies as positive.

text: had a billing issue last month, support fixed it within an hour
notes: resolved complaint — positive because the resolution dominates; no action items needed since it was already fixed. Locks in v1.1 behavior.

text: the UI is gorgeous but checkout is broken and I can't pay
notes: praise + unresolved blocker — blocker dominates so negative. Forces a tie-breaking rule in the prompt.
